response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video performer as Hakos Baelz based on the "SNAKE EYES" branding and 3D character model. 2. Determined the song is 'SNAKE EYES' by Hakos Baelz. 3. Used the search tool to find the full lyrics for 'SNAKE EYES' by searching 'SNAKE EYES Hakos Baelz lyrics'. 4. Found the lyrics containing a mix of English and Korean. 5. Mapped the song performance to 00:00-03:59 and the talk/merch segment to 03:59-04:35.
response.global_summary: The video features an energetic 3D dance performance by VTuber Hakos Baelz to her original song 'SNAKE EYES', followed by a segment where she discusses the song's production, and ends with a presentation of limited-edition birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: A 3D music video performance of the song 'SNAKE EYES' by Hakos Baelz, featuring choreography and flashing stage lights.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
준비

[Verse 1]
That’s good game, what a shame
Players they all complain
Why me? No, not again
Shout ra-ta-ta, but
Ain’t got time, so dry those eyes
Look around, what’s that I spy
The broken and bruised
I’ll got something to prove now

[Pre-Chorus]
Abracadabra, let’s go
Watch them like dust as they fall (they fall)
끝까지 가보자 go
나는 내 맘대로 해 (hey)
Double one, double win
Lowly to lottery
Do or die

[Chorus]
We hit that high (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Come on, don’t be shy (snake eyes, snake eyes)
뜨겁게 따라 올라 (불타올라)
놀자 all day, all night (all day, all night)

[Post-Chorus]
So turn it up, can’t stop, won’t stop preachin’
Who said the sky’s a limit
Show them that we mean business
We are the young and vicious
Snake eyes, they never lie
Fly high with pride
And leave your fears behind
지겨워

[Verse 2]
우리들의 광란의 party
보여줄게 환상 safari
Baddie, baddie, nobody can stop me
끼리끼리 붙어, come on closer
Go, go, 더 빨리 (check it out)
Actin’ all naughty
싹 다 부셔 모조리
모조리 싹 다 다다다
Shake it off, what goes around
Shut your mouth, will come back down
Ready the fight
Ready the screaming

[Pre-Chorus]
Abracadabra, let’s go
Watch it, we reapin’ it all (reapin’ it all)
꺾이지 않는 의지
될 대로 돼 볼래 play
Reason, our demon
Believe in the beaten
Just wait and see

[Chorus]
We hit that high (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Come on, don’t be shy (snake eyes, snake eyes)
뜨겁게 따라 올라 (불타올라)
놀자 all day, all night (all day, all night)

[Build]
Let the beat drop

[Drop]
Go, we go hard (go hard)
기사회생 전부를 걸어 bet
Go, we go hard, we want it all
다시 일어나 파괴와 재생

[Bridge]
죽지 않아, 전부 걸어
맞서 싸워, 시작이야
Take the crown
끝까지 달려가 rule (we’ll hit that high)

[Chorus]
We hit that eye (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Come on, don’t be shy (eye; snake eyes, snake eyes)
같이 춤을 춰 봐, 이렇게
멈출 순 없어 같이 dance all night (준비)

[Post-Chorus]
Don’t be afraid of losing
It’s just a new beginning
Look at the cards we dealing
Sometimes it takes a villain
Snake eyes, the time is nigh
Fly high with pride
And leave your fears behind
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Intro]
Junbi

[Verse 1]
That’s good game, what a shame
Players they all complain
Why me? No, not again
Shout ra-ta-ta, but
Ain’t got time, so dry those eyes
Look around, what’s that I spy
The broken and bruised
I’ll got something to prove now

[Pre-Chorus]
Abracadabra, let’s go
Watch them like dust as they fall (they fall)
Kkeutkkaji gaboja go
Naneun nae mamdaero hae (hey)
Double one, double win
Lowly to lottery
Do or die

[Chorus]
We hit that high (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Come on, don’t be shy (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Tteugeopge ttaraolla (bultaolla)
Nolja all day, all night (all day, all night)

[Post-Chorus]
So turn it up, can’t stop, won’t stop preachin’
Who said the sky’s a limit
Show them that we mean business
We are the young and vicious
Snake eyes, they never lie
Fly high with pride
And leave your fears behind
Jigyeowo

[Verse 2]
Urideurui gwangnanui party
Boyeojulge hwansang safari
Baddie, baddie, nobody can stop me
Kkirikkiri buteo, come on closer
Go, go, deo ppalli (check it out)
Actin’ all naughty
Ssak da busyeo mojori
Mojori ssak dadadada
Shake it off, what goes around
Shut your mouth, will come back down
Ready the fight
Ready the screaming

[Pre-Chorus]
Abracadabra, let’s go
Watch it, we reapin’ it all (reapin’ it all)
Kkeokiji anneun uiji
Doel daero dwaebollae play
Reason, our demon
Believe in the beaten
Just wait and see

[Chorus]
We hit that high (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Come on, don’t be shy (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Tteugeopge ttaraolla (bultaolla)
Nolja all day, all night (all day, all night)

[Build]
Let the beat drop

[Drop]
Go, we go hard (go hard)
Gisahoe-saeng jeonbureul georeo bet
Go, we go hard, we want it all
Dasi ireona pagoe-wa jae-saeng

[Bridge]
Jukji ana, jeonbu georeo
Matseo ssawo, sijagiya
Take the crown
Kkeutkkaji dallyeoga rule (we’ll hit that high)

[Chorus]
We hit that eye (snake eyes, snake eyes)
Come on, don’t be shy (eye; snake eyes, snake eyes)
Gachi chumeul chwo bwa, ireoke
Meomchul sun eopseo gachi dance all night (junbi)

[Post-Chorus]
Don’t be afraid of losing
It’s just a new beginning
Look at the cards we dealing
Sometimes it takes a villain
Snake eyes, the time is nigh
Fly high with pride
And leave your fears behind

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz talks to the audience about the production of 'SNAKE EYES' and presents limited-edition birthday merchandise.
